_comment: Machine queue derived from ROADMAP.md (ROADMAP = human truth, this = derived index). Orchestrator reads this + progress.json. Grow module-by-module as the build proceeds. Schema per task: id, module, title, spec, req, verify (shell, run in worktree root, exit 0 = pass), commit, depends_on, needs_review (halts for human review before commit), files (hints for the worker).

tasks.title: Card frontmatter schema + fixtures
tasks.spec: Write agentdb/kb/schema-card.js exporting validateCard(frontmatterObject) -> {ok:boolean, errors:string[]} for the SUPERPROMPT §5.1 schema (id/title/status/priority/project/assignee/parent/depends_on/tags/est_commits/parallel_safe/created_at/updated_at). NOTE: 'blocks' is NOT a field (D6 — derived). status enum: triage|backlog|todo|in_progress|blocked|review|done. Add fixtures agentdb/test/fixtures/good.card.md + bad-status.card.md (raw files for later parser use; the M0-1 TEST validates JS objects, not raw files — parsing is M1-1).
tasks.req: REQ-M0-1: schema accepts a good object and rejects a bad-status object with a field-specific error.

tasks.title: Status enum + transition map + WIP
tasks.spec: Extend agentdb/kb/schema-card.js (or a new agentdb/kb/status.js) with a legal-transition map for the status enum and WIP limit on in_progress (default 3, env KANBAN_WIP). legalTransition(from,to)->bool; wipLimit()->number.
tasks.req: REQ-M0-2: illegal transitions (e.g. done->in_progress) rejected; WIP read from env with fallback 3.

tasks.title: Layout convention + discover stub
tasks.spec: agentdb/kb/discover.js: findCards(root) -> sorted .card.md paths under root, ignoring node_modules/.git/.index. Doc the layout Projects/<proj>/.kanban/{roadmap.md,cards/*.card.md,topics/} in a header comment.
tasks.req: REQ-M0-3: discovers N cards in a fixture tree; ignores node_modules/.git.

tasks.title: Hand-rolled frontmatter+body parser
tasks.spec: Create agentdb/kb/parse.js: parseCardFile(path) -> {file, frontmatter, body}. Split '---' YAML frontmatter from markdown body; parse the §5.1 subset only (scalars, [a,b] inline arrays, 'key:' block lists). Return the frontmatter as a JS object the M0-1 schema expects. Zero deps (decision D3). Also write agentdb/kb/parse.test.js using the fixtures from M0-1 (good.card.md parses to a valid object; bad-status.card.md parses to an object whose status fails schema validation).
tasks.req: REQ-M1-1: good.card.md parses to the exact frontmatter object M0-1's validateCard accepts; arrays (depends_on, tags) parse correctly.

tasks.title: Workspace-wide discovery
tasks.spec: Extend agentdb/kb/discover.js (created in M0-3) with findCardsWorkspace(roots) that walks ~/Projects/*/.kanban/cards/ (plus env KANBAN_ROOTS extras) -> full sorted, deduped inventory of .card.md paths. Keep the single-root findCards(root) from M0-3 working. Update agentdb/kb/discover.test.js to cover both.
tasks.req: REQ-M1-2: over a 2-project fixture tree, findCardsWorkspace returns the right count and order, deduped.

tasks.title: Validator with file:line errors
tasks.spec: Create agentdb/kb/validate.js: validateCardFile(path) -> {ok, errors[]} using parse.js (M1-1) + schema-card.js (M0-1). Each error carries file:line so a human/agent can fix it. validateTree(root) validates every discovered card. Exit !=0 from a CLI helper on any invalid card.
tasks.req: REQ-M1-3: a tree with one bad card reports it precisely (file:line) and returns ok=false; a clean tree returns ok=true.
tasks.commit: feat(kanban): card validator w/ file:line errors (M1-3)

tasks.title: Tier-A index schema.sql + db.js
tasks.spec: Create agentdb/lib/db.js (open(mode), dbPath()->a project-local kanban agent.db, piDir()) and agentdb/lib/schema.sql with the Tier-A kb_* tables per SUPERPROMPT section 5.2: kb_cards (id,title,status,priority,project,assignee,parent,tags_json,file_path,frontmatter_json,body,updated_at,file_hash), kb_body_fts (FTS5 over title,body), kb_deps(from_id,to_id), kb_meta(file_path,mtime,file_hash). Idempotent CREATE IF NOT EXISTS. Write agentdb/lib/schema.test.js that loads schema.sql into a TEMP node:sqlite DB and asserts all 4 kb_* tables exist and FTS5 is available (PRAGMA compile_options).
tasks.req: REQ-M2-1: loading schema.sql is clean; all 4 kb_* tables present; FTS5 available.

tasks.title: kb full rebuild (DROP kb_* ONLY)
tasks.spec: agentdb/kb/index.js rebuild(db): DROP only kb_cards/kb_body_fts/kb_deps/kb_meta then recreate + walk all cards (discover M1-2 + parse M1-1 + validate M1-3) and INSERT. MUST NEVER touch any non-kb_ table (the tier-isolation contract). Write agentdb/kb/index.test.js: create a dummy non-kb table with a row, rebuild kb over fixtures, assert kb rows correct AND the non-kb table+row survive unchanged.
tasks.req: REQ-M2-2: rebuild is deterministic; a seeded non-kb table is byte-identical before/after (tier isolation).
tasks.commit: feat(kanban): kb full rebuild — DROP kb_* only (M2-2)

tasks.title: kb incremental index (mtime+hash)
tasks.spec: agentdb/kb/index.js index(db): compare kb_meta mtime+content-hash; upsert only changed cards; delete rows for removed files; refresh kb_deps from depends_on. Write agentdb/kb/incremental.test.js: touch one card -> only its row changes; delete a card -> its row+edges gone; untouched cards not rewritten.
tasks.req: REQ-M2-3: incremental touches only changed/removed cards.

tasks.title: ensureCurrent reconcile
tasks.spec: agentdb/kb/index.js ensureCurrent(db): if kb_* empty/missing -> rebuild; if any card newer than its kb_meta or count mismatch -> incremental. Write agentdb/kb/ensure.test.js.
tasks.req: REQ-M2-4: missing kb -> rebuild transparently; fresh -> no-op.

tasks.title: kb truth-mutation writer (REVIEW — path safety)
tasks.spec: agentdb/kb/write.js: createCard/moveStatus/setField that edit the .card.md (the TRUTH) preserving everything else byte-for-byte, then reindex that file. PATH SAFETY (red-blue): reject '..', absolute, out-of-tree, and non-.card.md targets; enforce status transitions (M0-2); auto-stamp updated_at. Write agentdb/kb/write.test.js with ABUSE CASES FIRST (path traversal rejected, illegal transition rejected, no file written on reject, move diff == 2 lines).
tasks.req: REQ-M2-5: abuse paths rejected with no write; legal move diff is exactly status+updated_at lines.
tasks.commit: feat(kanban): kb truth-mutation writer + path safety (M2-5)

tasks.title: Filter queries
tasks.spec: agentdb/kb/query.js: list({status,project,assignee,tag,priority,parent}) returning card rows from kb_cards. ALL filters parameterized (? placeholders + bound values) — never string-concat user input into SQL (red-blue: SQL injection is the #1 attack surface on a query layer). Unknown filter keys are ignored (forward-compat). Empty filter object = return everything. tag matches ANY-of (card.tags_json contains the tag). priority is exact-match (int). priority may be {min,max} for ranges (AND between min and max). Default ordering: priority DESC NULLS LAST, then id ASC. Write agentdb/kb/query.test.js with abuse cases FIRST: SQL-injection attempts ('1=1; DROP TABLE kb_cards;--', "' OR '1'='1") are treated as literal values; user input never reaches the SQL string; non-string values coerced safely; unknown keys ignored without error; no rows leak across projects.
tasks.req: REQ-M3-1: filters AND-compose correctly; SQL-injection attempts return as literal matches (no exec, no error); range priority works.

tasks.title: Dependency graph + ready() + cycle detect
tasks.spec: agentdb/kb/graph.js: (1) edges(db) -> [{from,to}] from kb_deps; (2) ready(db) -> ids whose status is 'todo' AND all depends_on ids are 'done' (or absent); (3) detectCycles(db) -> string[] of cycle-paths (e.g. ['A','B','C','A']) — REPORT, never throw (a corrupt kb shouldn't crash the caller); (4) blockedBy(id, db) -> ids that block this card (reverse edge lookup via idx_kb_deps_to); (5) blocks(id, db) -> ids this card blocks (forward edges). Pure functions, no I/O outside the db argument. Write agentdb/kb/graph.test.js covering: a simple chain (A→B→C), a parallel diamond, a self-loop (cycle: A→A), a 3-cycle (A→B→C→A), an unreachable card, a card with no depends_on (always ready if status=todo), ready() excludes blocked cards, ready() excludes in_progress cards (only todo status qualifies).
tasks.req: REQ-M3-2: ready() returns only todo cards whose deps are all done; detectCycles returns paths not throws; blockedBy/blocks round-trip via kb_deps.
tasks.commit: feat(kanban): kb dep graph + ready() + cycles (M3-2)

tasks.title: FTS5 search
tasks.spec: agentdb/kb/search.js: search(q, db, opts={limit=10}) -> [{id, title, snippet, rank}] from kb_body_fts. Use FTS5 bm25() ranking (lower = better; negate for sort-asc). snippet(title,body,'<mark>','</mark>','…',8) for the highlighted hit context. q is the user query — sanitize for FTS5 syntax (escape double-quotes by doubling; quote-wrap if it contains FTS5 operators). Pure function; no side effects. Write agentdb/kb/search.test.js with: a body term ranks its card first (the card containing the literal term beats a card that mentions it only in tags); absent term returns []; FTS5 syntax chars in q are escaped (no syntax error); limit caps the result count; empty q returns [].
tasks.req: REQ-M3-3: a body term ranks its card first; absent term → empty; FTS5 syntax chars in q do not raise.

tasks.title: JSONL parser + event normalization
tasks.spec: agentdb/ingest/sessions.js parse line -> {session_id, seq, type, ts, role, tool_name, tokens_in/out, is_error, content_sha, event_json}. Handle all pi entry types (session, model_change, thinking_level_change, message + future type passthrough). Unknown types: pass through (event_json retained, type recorded).
tasks.req: REQ-M4-1: each fixture line -> expected normalized row; unknown types pass through.

tasks.title: Append-only incremental ingest
tasks.spec: Per-file resume via sess_files(ingested_lines, total_lines, file_hash). Grew -> read from line N+1, append sess_events, upsert sess_sessions aggregates. Hash mismatch on the ingested prefix -> full re-ingest of that session (delete+reinsert its events). O(new lines).
tasks.req: REQ-M4-2: appending 10 lines to a 100-line session ingests exactly 10 events; rewriting the file re-ingests only that session.

tasks.title: Session aggregates + cost
tasks.spec: Derive sess_sessions rollups (message_count, tokens_in/out, cost, error_count, tool_calls_json, started/ended/last_event_at, model, cwd).
tasks.req: REQ-M4-3: aggregates match a hand-computed fixture; recompute on re-ingest.

tasks.title: Retention + prune (opt-in only)
tasks.spec: No auto-purge (D7). apple-pi db prune --before <date> --dry|--yes deletes sess_events/sess_sessions older than date; default --dry; --yes required to write. Logs the prune to analysis_runs.
tasks.req: REQ-M4-4: dry-run reports counts, writes nothing; --yes deletes scoped rows; kb_*/analysis_* untouched.

tasks.title: analysis_runs bookkeeping
tasks.spec: Start/end a run, record model/tokens/finding_count; every analyze call is one row. Idempotent within a day NOT required (runs are cheap, keep them for the trend).
tasks.req: REQ-M5-1: an analyze run creates exactly one analysis_runs row linked to its findings.

tasks.title: Error + cost findings
tasks.spec: analyze.js detectors: error_pattern (recurring is_error+tool_name clusters), cost_spike (session cost > rolling p95), model_drift (cost/tokens per turn trending over runs).
tasks.req: REQ-M5-2: over a seeded sess_* fixture, each detector emits the expected finding with evidence_json.

tasks.title: Tool-usage + card-stall findings
tasks.spec: tool_underuse/tool_overuse (tools never/rarely vs dominantly used), card_stall (cards in in_progress past a threshold, or blocked long). Reads sess_* tool_calls + kb_* statuses.
tasks.req: REQ-M5-3: fixtures trigger each finding type.

tasks.title: apple-pi analyze CLI (autonomous, read-only)
tasks.spec: Runs all detectors, prints a findings summary, writes analysis_findings. Read-only on the world (mutates only analysis_*).
tasks.req: REQ-M5-4: apple-pi analyze exits 0, prints N findings, rows exist.

tasks.title: propose — findings to proposals
tasks.spec: analysis/propose.js turns findings into machine-checkable proposals (each: {setting, from, to, rationale, expected_delta}, source_finding_ids). Extends the existing proposals table (+source_finding_ids, +outcome_id). Status proposed.
tasks.req: REQ-M6-1: a finding of a given kind yields a well-formed proposal citing its finding ids.

tasks.title: review (human gate, read-only)
tasks.spec: apple-pi review [--latest] — lists proposals + diffs, reads nothing else, writes nothing. (Mirrors existing autoresearch review.)
tasks.req: REQ-M6-2: shows pending proposals with their source findings; no mutation.

tasks.title: apply (gated, audited) (red-blue)
tasks.spec: apple-pi apply --latest --yes applies approved proposals: writes audit (what actually changed), snapshots 'before' metric, flips status applied. --yes required (D9). Never auto-applies.
tasks.req: REQ-M6-3: without --yes -> no-op + notice; with --yes -> changes applied + audit + before-snapshot recorded.

tasks.title: measure — outcome recording (closes the loop)
tasks.spec: analysis/measure.js for applied proposals past a window: compare before vs after metric -> improvement_outcomes (improved|neutral|regressed). Regressed -> next analyze can propose a revert.
tasks.req: REQ-M6-4: a seeded before/after yields the right verdict + delta.
tasks.commit: feat(agentdb): measure — closes the improvement loop (M6-4)

tasks.title: launchd schedule for the autonomous loop
tasks.spec: apple-pi schedule (extend existing) wires a periodic analyze + measure job (e.g. daily). Propose/apply stay manual/gated.
tasks.req: REQ-M6-5: schedule install creates the LaunchAgent; analyze runs unattended; no apply ever fires from the schedule.

tasks.title: chokidar watch both roots, debounced
tasks.spec: agentdb/watch.js watches ~/Projects/*/.kanban/ (-> kb reindex) AND ~/.pi/sessions/ (-> session ingest), debounce 150 ms, macOS fsevents.
tasks.req: REQ-M7-1: editing a card updates kb_* within ~300 ms; a new session line ingests within ~300 ms.

tasks.title: Single-instance + resilience
tasks.spec: Pidfile guard (one watcher); on parse failure of a partial write, skip + retry next tick; one bad card never stalls the watcher.
tasks.req: REQ-M7-2: second start exits cleanly ('already running'); truncated save is skipped, watcher survives.

tasks.title: launchd LaunchAgent + lazy reconcile
tasks.spec: apple-pi kanban watch daemon via LaunchAgent (D4); AND every query path calls ensureCurrent()/resume-ingest so it's correct with no daemon. Start/stop clean, no orphans.
tasks.req: REQ-M7-3: daemon down + edit a card -> next query still sees the change (lazy reconcile). start->stop leaves no orphan.

tasks.title: apple-pi kanban index [--rebuild]
tasks.spec: bin/apple-pi kanban index --rebuild drops kb_* first, then reindexes. Without --rebuild, calls ensureCurrent.
tasks.req: REQ-M8-1: exit 0 + row count; --rebuild drops kb_* first.

tasks.title: apple-pi kanban list/show/next/graph
tasks.spec: CLI wrappers around M3-1 (list), M3-1 single-card (show), M3-2 (next = WIP-aware ready, graph = ready + deps).
tasks.req: REQ-M8-2: filters; next is WIP-aware (M0-2) + ready (M3-2).

tasks.title: apple-pi kanban new/move (truth writers)
tasks.spec: CLI wrappers around M2-5 createCard/moveStatus. Path safety + transition rules enforced (red-blue).
tasks.req: REQ-M8-3: new -> validate -> show; move diff = 2 lines.
tasks.commit: feat(kanban): CLI kanban new/move — truth writers (M8-3)

tasks.title: apple-pi db ingest/status/query
tasks.spec: CLI wrappers: ingest (M4-2), status (counts), query (parameterized filter over sess_*/analysis_*).
tasks.req: REQ-M8-4: ingest resumes append-only; status shows session/event counts.

tasks.title: apple-pi kanban validate [--project]
tasks.spec: CLI wrapper around validate.js. Exit 1 + report on invalid; clean -> 0.
tasks.req: REQ-M8-5: exit 1 + report on invalid; clean -> 0.

tasks.title: apple-pi improve (propose, gated)
tasks.spec: CLI wrapper around propose + apply (M6-1, M6-3). No apply without --yes.
tasks.req: REQ-M8-6: propose writes proposals; no apply without --yes.
tasks.commit: feat(agentdb): CLI improve — propose, gated apply (M8-6)

tasks.title: apple-pi measure
tasks.spec: CLI wrapper around M6-4 measure.js.
tasks.req: REQ-M8-7: records outcomes for applied proposals past window.

tasks.title: apple-pi db prune --before
tasks.spec: CLI wrapper around M4-4 prune.
tasks.req: REQ-M8-8: dry vs yes; kb_*/analysis_* untouched.

tasks.title: kanban_list / kanban_get
tasks.spec: Pi agent tools. Reads kb_cards via M3-1 list() + per-card fetch.
tasks.req: REQ-M9-1: pi harness returns correct JSON from kb_*.

tasks.title: kanban_create / kanban_move (truth writers)
tasks.spec: Pi agent tools. Wrap M2-5 with harness-friendly error surface.
tasks.req: REQ-M9-2: same path-safety as M2-5; file created + reindexed.

tasks.title: kanban_next / kanban_graph
tasks.spec: Pi agent tools. next = WIP-aware ready; graph = ready + blockedBy.
tasks.req: REQ-M9-3: next is WIP+ready-aware.

tasks.title: db_query (sessions/events/findings)
tasks.spec: Pi agent tool. Read-only agent query over sess_*/analysis_* (e.g. 'my last N errors', 'sessions that touched card X'). Parameterized.
tasks.req: REQ-M9-4: parameterized query; no mutation; returns JSON.

tasks.title: self_improve trigger
tasks.spec: Agent-callable analyze (+ optional propose) within a session. NEVER applies — apply is CLI-gated only.
tasks.req: REQ-M9-5: harness runs analyze, returns findings, applies nothing.
tasks.commit: feat(agentdb): pi tool self_improve — analyze only (M9-5)

tasks.title: Deprecate kanban-bridge.ts
tasks.spec: Keep one release as a read-only alias to the new tools, then remove.
tasks.req: REQ-M9-6: alias still answers; deprecation notice logged.

tasks.title: smoke/kanban-*.sh
tasks.spec: End-to-end shell smokes: index, query, truth writer, disposable db.
tasks.req: REQ-M10-1: all green in bash smoke/run.sh.

tasks.title: Tier-isolation smoke (headline reliability test)
tasks.spec: smoke/agentdb-tier-isolation.sh — seed sess_*+analysis_*, snapshot their row hashes, kanban index --rebuild, assert Tier B byte-identical; then db prune and assert kb_* byte-identical. Proves each tier is disposable independently.
tasks.req: REQ-M10-2: rebuild leaves Tier B untouched; prune leaves Tier A untouched.

tasks.title: Ingest idempotency + append smoke
tasks.spec: smoke/agentdb-ingest.sh — ingest twice -> no dupes; append lines -> only new events.
tasks.req: REQ-M10-3: ingest twice -> no dupes; append -> only new.

tasks.title: Sanitize + dep-budget
tasks.spec: Extend smoke/sanitize.sh over agentdb/; assert deps <= chokidar (+ gray-matter only if D3 fallback used). No personal info on the product surface.
tasks.req: REQ-M10-4: bash smoke/sanitize.sh exit 0.

tasks.title: Import existing workspace cards (dogfood parity)
tasks.spec: The real ~/Projects/*/.kanban/cards/*.md already match §5.1 -> apple-pi kanban index. (Drop blocks from any that still store it — D6; recompute.) Verify parity.
tasks.req: REQ-M11-1: kb row count == sum of cards/*.card.md.

tasks.title: Ingest the 89 existing sessions
tasks.spec: apple-pi db ingest over ~/.pi/sessions/. Confirm event/session counts; spot-check aggregates vs runs (existing daily table).
tasks.req: REQ-M11-2: all 89 files ingested; sess_events count plausible vs JSONL line totals.

tasks.title: Absorb autoresearch.db -> agent.db
tasks.spec: agentdb/lib/migrate.js copies runs+proposals from ~/.pi/agent/autoresearch.db into agent.db; points lifecycle/lib/db.js dbPath() at agent.db; keeps a .pre-merge backup of the old db.
tasks.req: REQ-M11-3: after migrate, apple-pi status reads from agent.db; old rows present; old db backed up.

tasks.title: Decommission the-agent kanban (gated, last) (confirm with user first)
tasks.spec: Stop the kanban-roadmap-sync cron; archive ~//<agent-dir>/kanban/boards/; unset pi KANBAN_DB_PATH (was the the-agent DB); remove kanban-bridge.ts post-deprecation. CONFIRM WITH USER BEFORE DISABLING THE CRON (it feeds the web kanban today).
tasks.req: REQ-M11-4: new tools the only kanban surface; web kanban either repointed or formally retired.
